h2.note: transcript-level proxy for the per-turn H2 (§4.3); needs a real (non-mock) full-N run to mean anything

cliIsolation.claude: non-persistent temp cwd with project/local settings and tools disabled

scored.recoheredEarlier: treating the header like it is saying the rainfall amount
scored.statedInsightEvidence: “could change in another row” helps separate the row value from the header.
scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner would continue to ask for mechanical formatting rules while remaining conceptually confused about headers versus values.
scored.tutorReversalEvidence: Cell value = copied from a row and could change in another row.
scored.tutorReversalJustification: The tutor introduces a variability test as a new mechanism to help the learner distinguish static headers from dynamic row values, addressing the failure of the prior 'slot label' definition.
scored.tutorAdaptationJustification: There is no tutor turn after the learner's final pivot turn to demonstrate contingent adaptation.
